title: Parsons Rectangle Coffee Table
summary: A flat-panel Parsons-style coffee table with two shelf panels and a 2x2 frame — the rectangular sibling of this catalog's square Parsons table.
description:
Parsons-style furniture is defined by its flush, boxy simplicity — no visible legs standing proud, no aprons, just clean panels meeting at square edges. This version builds two 1x12 panels (top and shelf) and wraps each in a 2x2 frame, then joins the two panel-and-frame assemblies with side frames to complete the rectangular box.

The source plan calls out something worth taking seriously: solid 1x12 boards need to acclimate to your indoor humidity before you build with them, and if your home runs humid, 3/4" plywood is the safer substitute for the panels. Wood that's still equilibrating when you build it can cup or gap at the seams weeks later — better to let it sit for a few days first than to rebuild a joint that opened up after the fact.

materials.name: Pine, 1x12, 8 ft
materials.note: Top and shelf panels — or substitute 3/4" plywood cut to 22-1/2" x 45" if your indoor humidity runs high.

cutList.note: Joined edge to edge into two panels, or substitute a single plywood panel per shelf.
Measure and cut to match your actual panel width.

steps.title: Build the two panels
steps.body: Join the 1x12 boards edge to edge to form two panels — one for the top, one for the shelf — using 3/4" pocket holes and 1-1/4" pocket hole screws. Then drill 3/4" pocket holes around the edges of both panels for attaching to their frames.

steps.title: Frame the panels
steps.body: Measure the actual width of your assembled 1x12 panels and cut the 2x2 end frame pieces to match. Drill a 1-1/2" pocket hole in each end of these pieces, then attach the panels to the frames with 1-1/4" pocket hole screws and glue.

steps.title: Build and attach the side frames
steps.body: Build the side frames with 1-1/2" pocket holes, 2-1/2" pocket hole screws, and glue, then attach the side frames to the panel assemblies to complete the table's box shape.

images.alt: A rectangular flat-panel Parsons-style coffee table with a shelf below the top
